item.title: Another full house for Hermes! Thank you to the organizers and all of the attendees.

item.title:
Very interested in this
I used to build web apps with GUI; now I just share GitHub repos with the c...
item.description:
Very interested in this
I used to build web apps with GUI; now I just share GitHub repos with the code and people can customize the UI however they like
Kind of like Karpathy's "idea file": just write down the idea, and people's agents can build it for them in a customized way
--- @zarazhangrui | ❤️ 3 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 174
item.author: @zarazhangrui

item.title: @turingou 别误会，我说断章取义的意思就是说原文是断章取义。另外我只是说观点，也不针对人。
item.author: @dotey

item.title:
Also related how settling somewhere increasingly doesn't mean anything anymore
Even with kids and f...
item.description:
Also related how settling somewhere increasingly doesn't mean anything anymore
Even with kids and family people are more mobile than ever and just hop to the next place
Which is especially beneficial in a geopolitically unstable world where any place can be the next war zone
Better be mobile than not!
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 16 | 🔁 0 | 💬 6 | 👁 2045
item.author: @levelsio

item.title:

item.title: 看看我使用基于 tuwa 的新产品学习西班牙语，这个新产品目标也很明确：和它实时聊天，用自己的母语，听懂、说出、学会世界上任何一种语言。并且从头到尾都不是为了考试而学习，每个人有自己专属的学习路径和词...
item.author: @turingou

item.title:
I kinda love the retardmaxxxing here
Move somewhere, then if it sucks don't accept sunk costs and j...
item.description:
I kinda love the retardmaxxxing here
Move somewhere, then if it sucks don't accept sunk costs and just move out in less than a month 👌
--- @levelsio | ❤️ 38 | 🔁 2 | 💬 9 | 👁 9724

item.title: Earlier this month, an Erdős problem that had been open for 60 years was solved with help from GPT-5...
item.description:
Earlier this month, an Erdős problem that had been open for 60 years was solved with help from GPT-5.4 Pro.
What happens now that AI is getting good at math?
OpenAI researchers @SebastienBubeck and @ErnestRyu join host @AndrewMayne to explain what changed and what it could mean for the future of research.
--- @OpenAI | ❤️ 378 | 🔁 41 | 💬 51 | 👁 23980
item.author: @OpenAI

item.title: We are proud to have helped NASA optimize this code and watch it power a pivotal mission like Artemi...
item.description:
We are proud to have helped NASA optimize this code and watch it power a pivotal mission like Artemis.
We can't wait to see the new engineering this enables for the broader U.S. aerospace community.
--- @nvidia | ❤️ 53 | 🔁 3 | 💬 5 | 👁 6307
item.author: @nvidia

item.title:
No one will believe me but this happened this morning..
X (clearly a founder): I’m talking to all t...
item.description:
No one will believe me but this happened this morning..
X (clearly a founder): I’m talking to all the Tier 1 VCs - and have second meetings.
Y (angel, friend maybe): You mean the neolab index funds?
💀
📌 Sightglass on 7th St
--- @nikunj | ❤️ 7 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 516
item.author: @nikunj
